problem: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost?
hypothesis: Aerogel porosity for thermal/acoustic insulation may resolve How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 14 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
